mapper.select: SELECT id, loc_date, name, repeat_annually, created_at FROM days_off_custom WHERE YEAR(loc_date) = #{year} ORDER BY loc_date ASC
SELECT id, loc_date, name, repeat_annually, created_at FROM days_off_custom WHERE repeat_annually = TRUE ORDER BY loc_date ASC
SELECT id, loc_date, name, repeat_annually, created_at FROM days_off_custom WHERE loc_date = #{locDate} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO days_off_custom (loc_date, name, repeat_annually) VALUES (#{locDate}, #{name}, #{repeatAnnually}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), repeat_annually = VALUES(repeat_annually)
